facts.summary: Orchestrator CLI exposes: init, version, where, doctor (--global), status, validate, discover, analyze, plan, generate, audit, fix, snapshot, changed, update, all.
findProjectRoot walks upward from cwd until it locates .docgen/project.json; absence triggers 'not initialized' failure for project commands.
Headless Command Code args are built as ['-p', --trust, --skip-onboarding, --yolo, --max-turns <stage|default>, optional --model]; DOCGEN_MAX_TURNS and DOCGEN_MODEL env vars override config.
runCommandCode sets DOCGEN_MODE=1, DOCGEN_STAGE, DOCGEN_TARGET and writes a per-run metadata file to .docgen/runs/<runId>.json before/after each headless run.

The 'all' command runs doDiscover('.'), doAnalyze, doPlan, doGenerateAll, doAuditAll, doSnapshot in sequence; discover validates .docgen/evidence/index.json and analyze validates .docgen/model/system.json.
assetFile resolves a project override at .docgen/<kind>/<name> before falling back to engineHome/<kind>/<name> for prompts and schemas.

Stages are enforced as validation gates: discover requires/validates evidence index, analyze requires evidence and validates system model, plan requires the system model, generate/audit operate on manifest pages.
